ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sentences" (
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentence */,
  "takes_female" INTEGER /* Indicates if the action involves a female recipient */,
  "plural" INTEGER /* Indicates if the subject is plural */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the sentence type */,
  "verb_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the verb used in the sentence */,
  "frequency_rank" INTEGER /* Rank order of the frequency of the sentence */,
  "DOsentence" TEXT /* Direct Object sentence structure */,
  "PDsentence" TEXT /* Prepositional Direct sentence structure */,
  "theme_type" TEXT /* Type of thematic role in the sentence */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID for the thematic context */,
  "recipient_id" TEXT /* Type of recipient in the sentence */,
  "trial_set" INTEGER /* Trial set number associated with the sentence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentence was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentence was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the sentence */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the sentence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentences_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentences_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES recipients ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentences_trial_set FOREIGN KEY ("trial_set") REFERENCES trial_sets ("trial_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentences_classification FOREIGN KEY ("classification") REFERENCES classifications ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentences_verb_id FOREIGN KEY ("verb_id") REFERENCES verbs ("verb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "verbs" (
  "verb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verb */,
  "verb_name" TEXT /* Name of the verb */,
  "verb_type" TEXT /* Type of the verb (e.g., action, linking) */,
  "transitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the verb is transitive */,
  "irregular" INTEGER /* Indicates if the verb is irregular */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the verb */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("verb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "example_sentence" TEXT /* Example sentence illustrating the theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient type */,
  "recipient_type" TEXT /* Type of the recipient (e.g., longDefinite, shortIndefinite) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recipient type */,
  "example_sentence" TEXT /* Example sentence illustrating the recipient type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "example_sentence" TEXT /* Example sentence illustrating the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_sets" (
  "trial_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial set */,
  "trial_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial set */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the trial set was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_rank" INTEGER /* Rank order of frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the frequency data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, student, admin) */,
  "institutional_affiliation" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sentence */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sentence was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made to the sentence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sentence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentence_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentence variation */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original sentence */,
  "variation" TEXT /* Variation of the sentence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variation was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentence_variations_sentence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentence_variations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence being tagged */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag for the sentence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_sentence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* User ID who assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
